LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS IRENE LAUREL AND JESUS LAUREL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 11, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 14, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ARTHUR JAVIER, ESQ., 714.441.1144, FOR DEFENDANTS JESUS LAUREL, IRENE LAUREL, LEONORA O'BRIEN AND TEEN O'BRIEN; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT REVIEWS COURTESY COPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE PROVIDED BY DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL. PER DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL, THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS ATTACHED TO THE ORIGINAL NOTICE OF MOTION AND NOT FILED AS A SEPARATE DOCUMENT. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONFIRMS NEW RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTs IRENE LAUREL, JESUS LAUREL, LEONORA O'BRIAN and TEEN O'BRIAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Apr-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs IRENE LAUREL and JESUS LAUREL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to April 11, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and Complaint to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 14, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer will be taken off calendar. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
